$comment: GVR agent config aligned to current Retell API (April 2026). Removed: voice_temperature/voice_speed/volume (deprecated), transfer_failed (not a valid webhook_event), version_label/data_storage_retention_days/reminder_max_count/backchannel_frequency/backchannel_words/ambient_sound/vocab_specialization/allow_user_dtmf/pii_config (not in current schema). end_call_after_silence_ms minimum is 10000ms — use 30000.

post_call_analysis_data.name: intent_summary
post_call_analysis_data.description: One sentence summary of why the caller called.
examples: Caller asked what travel savings dollars are.

post_call_analysis_data.name: compliance_clean
post_call_analysis_data.description: True if no forbidden phrasing or unsupported numerics reached the caller.
